description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold color scheme of purple, black, and yellow. The upper is primarily constructed from synthetic materials, with a smooth black vamp and toe box, accented by purple overlays and yellow highlights along the laces, collar, and side panels. The shoe has a thick, sculpted purple sole with angular design elements and a prominent midsole, suggesting enhanced cushioning and support. Yellow laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, and the collar is padded for ankle protection. The side of the shoe displays a dynamic, lightning-bolt-like yellow accent, adding a sporty and energetic aesthetic. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion.
description: A high-top sneaker with a striking purple, black, and yellow colorway, featuring a thick sculpted sole and dynamic side accents. The shoe is modern, sporty, and visually bold.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the padded collar, layered heel construction, and the transition of colors from purple to black with yellow highlights.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the dynamic yellow accent, thick purple sole, and the overall streamlined silhouette of the sneaker.
description_view_2: Front angled view emphasizing the yellow laces, perforated black toe box, and the robust, textured front sole.
description_view_3: Rear side view displaying the padded collar, layered heel, and the continuation of the yellow accent along the side.
